params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in decimal degrees, range -90 to 90.

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in decimal degrees, range -180 to 180.

params.name: cnt
params.description: Number of timestamps to return. Defaults to 40.

params.name: mode
params.description: Response format. Default is JSON.

params.name: units
params.description: Units of measurement. standard, metric, or imperial.

params.name: lang
params.description: Localization language code.

params.name: appid
params.description: OpenWeather API key.

items.docs: Returns forecast weather data with 3-hour granularity for the next 5 days for the supplied latitude and longitude. Includes temperature, weather conditions, wind, precipitation probability, and more for 40 forecast timestamps.

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in decimal degrees, range -90 to 90.

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in decimal degrees, range -180 to 180.

params.name: cnt
params.description: Number of hourly timestamps to return. Up to 96.

params.name: mode
params.description: Response format. Default is JSON.

params.name: units
params.description: Units of measurement. standard, metric, or imperial.

params.name: lang
params.description: Localization language code.

params.name: appid
params.description: OpenWeather API key.

items.docs: Returns hourly forecast weather data for the next 4 days (up to 96 hourly timestamps) for the supplied latitude and longitude. Available on Developer, Professional, and Expert plans.

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in decimal degrees, range -90 to 90.

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in decimal degrees, range -180 to 180.

params.name: cnt
params.description: Number of days to return. 1 to 16.

params.name: mode
params.description: Response format. Default is JSON.

params.name: units
params.description: Units of measurement. standard, metric, or imperial.

params.name: lang
params.description: Localization language code.

params.name: appid
params.description: OpenWeather API key.

items.docs: Returns daily forecast weather data for up to 16 days for the supplied latitude and longitude. Each daily entry includes morning, day, evening, night, and min/max temperatures.

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in decimal degrees, range -90 to 90.

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in decimal degrees, range -180 to 180.

params.name: cnt
params.description: Number of days to return. 1 to 30.

params.name: mode
params.description: Response format. Default is JSON.

params.name: units
params.description: Units of measurement. standard, metric, or imperial.

params.name: lang
params.description: Localization language code.

params.name: appid
params.description: OpenWeather API key.

items.docs: Returns daily climatic forecast weather data for the next 30 days for the supplied latitude and longitude.
